required_preferences.fact: Temporarily participates in indoor or administrative charity support (event planning, data entry), avoiding physical outdoor clean-up activities during recovery

supersedes.fact: Volunteers at environmental clean-up events quarterly; never participates in indoors-only charity work

required_preferences.fact: No longer streams TV shows after 8pm — restricts evening screen use entirely to comply with sleep study protocols; only watches TV during daytime hours before dinner

supersedes.fact: Only streams TV shows after 8pm; never watches during daylight hours

required_preferences.fact: Reads physical books (mysteries, not thrillers) or listens to guided meditation audio as nighttime wind-down activities, strictly avoiding screens after 8pm due to sleep study requirements
Skips all phone notifications except from family — keeps device on ‘Do Not Disturb’ except for calls from her son or partner
Keeps a side-effect journal every evening after taking her migraine medication, recording symptoms and any notable changes
Adopts guided meditation audio after study sessions to unwind from screen time, helping manage sleep and migraine triggers

persona: A mid-career helpdesk technician working in a university IT department
